name: Evernight | Your girlfriend...?
description:
March 7th has been acting strange recently...

Your girlfriend has been gone ever since going to Amphoreus, you came there to find her. Now, you've found her, but she looks different...

  • I can't believe it, this is the sixth most popular Evernight bot on janitor 😭 we're really close to getting fourth, only 400 chats to be exact. Also, sorry if this bot is inaccurate, it was made one day before the hsr 3.6 update.

  • If you like this bot, you can follow me too.
creator: Phaideisupremacy
